2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function called fsnotify_modify_mark_mask() to the Linux kernel's fsnotify module. The function allows callers to modify an existing mark's mask by setting and clearing specific bits, and also updates the associated connector if necessary. This is required for nfsd to handle directory delegations correctly. The patch introduces a new exported function that can be used by other parts of the kernel to modify marks and their masks.
